chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-288 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on office objections 2.For orders on MA 2454/25 3.For hearing of main case 4.For orders on MA 2455/25 04-12-2025 None present for the applicants. **** None present for the applicants though intimation notice was issued to counsel for the applicants for today’s date of hearing; no intimation is received. Even on the last two consecutive dates of hearing, none appeared on behalf of applicants, which reflects that the applicants and their counsel have lost interest in pursuing this matter. Resultantly, the instant Crl. Misc. Application along with listed application(s) is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
